title: Malaysian Shrimp Noodle Stir Fry
description: Enjoy this spicy, flavorful, and quick-to-make noodle dish that's perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the minced ginger and garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the sambal oelek and cook for another minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the wok and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, and red chili flakes to the wok and stir to combine.
Return the cooked shrimp to the wok and stir to combine with the noodle mixture.
Serve the Malaysian shrimp noodle stir-fry hot, garnished with chopped green onions and sliced red chili peppers if desired.
